findings.remediation: Restart logging (aws cloudtrail start-logging --name <trail>), restore the trail configuration, and investigate the principal responsible. Treat as defense evasion.
findings.title: CloudTrail logging disabled or deleted

findings.remediation: Confirm the key was expected. If not, deactivate and delete it (aws iam update-access-key --status Inactive; aws iam delete-access-key) and rotate the user's credentials.
findings.title: IAM access key created
findings.description: Long-lived access key created for alice.

findings.remediation: Restrict the ingress rule to a specific trusted CIDR instead of 0.0.0.0/0 or ::/0; prefer SSM Session Manager or a bastion host for administrative access.
findings.title: Security group ingress opened to the internet
